Class BotStateDelta.Builder

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite.Builder
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage.Builder<BotStateDelta.Builder>
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<BotStateDelta.Builder>
com.soulfiremc.grpc.generated.BotStateDelta.Builder
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.google.protobuf.Message.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLite.Builder, com.google.protobuf.MessageLiteOrBuilder, com.google.protobuf.MessageOrBuilder, BotStateDeltaOrBuilder, Cloneable
Enclosing class:
BotStateDelta
public static final class BotStateDelta.Builder extends com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage.Builder<BotStateDelta.Builder> implements BotStateDeltaOrBuilder
Partial update to the bot's live state. Only fields present have changed
since the last delta or snapshot. Clients should merge deltas onto their
local copy of BotLiveState.
Protobuf type soulfire.v1.BotStateDelta
